evidence_summary: Reviewed the canonical round-221 worktree against merged base commit ea8db76, where the round branch tip, base branch tip, and merge-base all match and the live implementation exists as an uncommitted docs-only diff. The implementation-owned scope stays limited to the new milestone-4 closeout artifact plus TODO.md, implementation_notes.md, and CHANGELOG.md, while orchestrator/state.json and the pointer stubs remain controller-owned bookkeeping outside implementation scope. The closeout artifact matches the rev-026 plan and verification contract, records the selected same-wrapper nested-forall packet plus sameLaneClearBoundaryExpr through sameLaneNonupleAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr as the current broader-positive frontier on both authoritative entrypoints, keeps sameLaneAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr as predecessor truth only, keeps the accepted decuple/deeper alias frontier and P2/N1/N2/N6 guardrails closed, and leaves docs/thesis-deviations.yaml unchanged. No code/test/Cabal files changed, so fresh cabal or thesis-gate reruns were not required for this round; instead the artifact honestly cites accepted round-220 evidence, including ./scripts/thesis-conformance-gate.sh and cabal build all && cabal test with 1365 examples, 0 failures.
